title: Destination chain continuation phase
summary: After the first signature-pocket wave, lane 3 should continue building a chain of unforgettable places. This phase adds one coast-side continuation and one high-country relief or threshold continuation using the current traversal language.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the coast-side destination continuation handoff.
execution_order.why_now: The front half should gain another memorable place by feel, not just width.
A second memorable coast beat will keep the front half from feeling too connective.
The new place should feel special without route noise or travel confusion.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the high-country relief continuation handoff.
execution_order.why_now: The second act should gain another memorable threshold or relief place.
One more high-country destination beat will strengthen exposure by feel.
The new beat should stay cozy, readable, and recoverable.

guardrails: No traversal HUD growth or harsher punishment.
Favor memorable place identity over longer route length.
